name: outer-wilds-themed-new-tab
description: Outer Wilds 风格 3D 篝火新标签页 Chrome 扩展，内置番茄钟。

scripts.pack:extension: npm run build && rm -rf release && mkdir -p release && zip -r release/outer-wilds-new-tab.zip manifest.json newtab.html index.html styles.css newtab-main.js pomodoro.js pomodoro-ui.js confirm-dialog.js audio.js storage-adapter.js background.js dist assets icons

author: KateLiao
